## orch-go servers open

Open project's web port in browser

### Synopsis

Open the web server URL for a project in the default browser.

```
orch-go servers open [project] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for open
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --server string   OpenCode server URL (default "http://localhost:4096")
```
